title: Payment
description: Represents a payment processed by Square.

status.description: Indicates whether the payment is APPROVED, COMPLETED, CANCELED, or FAILED.

source_type.description: The source type for this payment.

location_id.description: The ID of the location associated with the payment.

created_at.description: The timestamp of when the payment was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp of when the payment was last updated.

Money.description: Represents an amount of money in a specific currency.

amount.description: Amount in the smallest denomination of the currency.
